clean_story:
Now I will teach you Deep.

Deep is like big water—so much that no stick can touch bottom. It swallows light, like night in cave with no fire. When you stand at edge, it pulls you with cold, heavy hand. Sound dies there, like voice in thick fur. Things move slow, like old bear in winter sleep. Look down, feel fear—this is Deep.
